title: Garlicky Chewy Greek Lentils Stew
description: A garlicky, chewy Greek-inspired lentil stew with tangy sauerkraut and a savory braise, perfect for kids and Whole30-friendly.
instructions: Rinse the lentils under cold water and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the diced carrot and celery, cooking for another 3 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth, then stir in the lentils and sauerkraut.
Season with dried oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, cover, and reduce heat to low. Cook for 35–40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lentils are tender and the stew thickens.
Finish by stirring in lemon juice, adjusting seasoning if needed, and serve hot.
